title: piper corylistachyum
intro: Piper corylistachyum, also known as Long Pepper, is a flowering plant native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the pepper family (Piperaceae). Traditionally, Long Pepper has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, with its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Long Pepper include relieving nausea, indigestion, and diarrhea, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Long Pepper include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's seeds, leaves, or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
